problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: Combining Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
